concurrent.futures/ProcessPoolExecutor/k.name: kill_workers
concurrent.futures/ProcessPoolExecutor/k.description: Attempt to kill all living worker processes immediately by calling Process.kill on each of them. Internally, it will also call Executor.shutdown() to ensure that all other resources associated with the executor are freed. After calling this method the caller should no longer submit tasks to the executor. Added in version 3.14.
